title: RettungsMarsch 1913 - saving 20 seconds (Long Version) 21:30
description:
1913 - RettungsMarsch - Rescue March
saving twenty seconds reprocesses footage from the Russian film RettungsMarsch of 1913 depicting the emergency movement of a fire-truck.
Saving twenty seconds of the year 1913, watching the most modern firetruck of its time as well as the firefighters during a firedrill - the firetruck hardly fits in the old firestation - is an eyesharpener experience. Through the glass of passing time the present and even more so the future look like a frail and derelict good of temporary and transient character. There is a feeling that everything seems to be running backwards. Is time in reverse? The Eyesharpener makes us realize the  temporality of progress as we constantly aim for improvement to the best of our knowledge and belief.

archive material Moscow
duration of original material 20 seconds
